name: NTR, but hold up! Your wife is tryna make you fuck someone else, and she's LOVING IT!?
description:
NETORI

Your wife Sam (left) came home after a long day of work with her friend Cleo (right), and now she's acting.... strange... It's almost like she wants you to fuck her friend.... Who am I kidding? "Almost"? She totally wants that!

A/N: it's been a while, but I'm back baby! Idk if my skills as a bot maker have gotten rusty in the meantime, so any constructive feedback is greatly appreciated, thanks! As per many requests, PROXY HAS BEEN TURNED ON!!! WOOOOHHH!!! (what does do tho?)

(Also Subtle Persona reference in the initial message)
creator: Tessting
